text: Thank you for calling Speedy Auto Repair, this is Michael speaking. How can I help you today?
segments.speaker: local party

text: Hi Michael, my name is Nancy Cooper. I found your number through a Google search.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Great to hear from you, Nancy! What can I assist you with today?
segments.speaker: local party

text: I’m looking for reliable diagnostics for my car. It’s been making some strange noises lately.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: I understand how concerning that can be. We offer full vehicle diagnostics that last about an hour.
segments.speaker: local party

text: How much does that cost?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: The full vehicle diagnostics are priced at $100.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Okay, that sounds reasonable. When can I bring it in?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: We’re open Monday through Friday from 8 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday from 9 AM to 4 PM. When would you like to come in?
segments.speaker: local party

text: Would next Tuesday work for you?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Let me check… Yes, we have availability. What time were you thinking?
segments.speaker: local party

text: How about 10 AM?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Perfect! I’ll schedule you for 10 AM next Tuesday.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Great, thank you! Will I need to leave my car there for a while?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Yes, typically for diagnostics, we might need it for the hour, and we'll call you with the results.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Alright, sounds good. Also, do you do any repairs if needed?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Absolutely! We can handle a range of repairs, from engine issues to brake systems.
segments.speaker: local party

text: That’s good to know! I’ll definitely need to discuss that after the diagnostics.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Sure thing. If any repairs are needed, we can provide you with a quote right after the diagnostics.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Awesome! I appreciate your help, Michael.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: No problem at all, Nancy! Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
segments.speaker: local party

text: No, that’s it for now. Thank you!
segments.speaker: remote party

text: You’re welcome! I look forward to seeing you next Tuesday at 10 AM.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Thanks, Michael! Have a good day.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: You too, Nancy! Bye now.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Goodbye!
segments.speaker: remote party
